summary:
OVERCOMING ADDICTIONS AND SICKNESS THROUGH FAITH: Brandon advises his audience on overcoming addictions like nicotine and alcohol, as well as physical ailments, by applying the biblical principle from Romans of calling things that are not as though they were. He emphasizes that faith without works is dead, instructing believers to actively speak their deliverance over their circumstances while maintaining practical actions. To illustrate this, Brandon recounts the story of a diabetic woman who continually declared her healing while simultaneously taking her prescribed insulin until she was medically verified as completely healed. He applies this same principle to conditions like cancer, asthma, and high blood pressure, asserting that believers must verbalize their healing and deliverance.

THE IMPORTANCE OF LOVE AND HOLINESS: Brandon explains that faith operates through love, making it essential to eliminate strife and discord from one's home to avoid blocking divine blessings. He shares that he is quick to repent and apologize when he causes friction in his marriage. Furthermore, Brandon conveys a message from the Lord stating that Jesus is returning for a purified people. He insists that believers must practice a repentant, holy lifestyle that clearly differentiates them from the secular world rather than relying solely on grace as an excuse for sin.

DEMONIC MANIFESTATIONS AND THE GLORY OF GOD: Brandon recounts an incident where he was driving and loudly praying in the spirit along with his mentor Gina's broadcast. During this, a man in the adjacent car began to wildly manifest demonic spirits. The Lord explained to Brandon that this occurred because the glory of God was present, causing the demons to react. Brandon compares this upcoming end-time spiritual power to the book of Acts, where Peter's shadow healed people, predicting that believers will soon radiate such a strong divine presence that individuals will be delivered simply by walking past them in public places.

OBEDIENCE AND FINANCIAL BREAKTHROUGHS: Brandon teaches that obedience is the key to experiencing the miraculous. He encourages believers to follow divine instructions promptly, regardless of the location. Additionally, he highlights the power of spoken words over finances, explaining that he continuously speaks blessings over his tithes and offerings while trusting God to rebuke the devourer and turn situations around.

END-TIME PROPHECIES AND THE RAPTURE: Brandon discusses his firm belief in a pre-tribulation Rapture, rejecting the notion that the church will endure the upcoming tribulation, which he describes as an impending hell on earth. He mentions past visions regarding a microchip and emphasizes that believers are not appointed to wrath but are destined for the Marriage Supper of the Lamb.

THE HEAVENLY COURTROOM VISION: Brandon describes a vision of a heavenly courtroom where Satan was actively accusing him of opening doors to spiritual attacks through sin. During this vision, an angel urged him to stop allowing these vulnerabilities, while Jesus instructed him to immediately take communion. Upon partaking in communion and pleading the blood of Jesus, Brandon witnessed Jesus acting as his defense attorney, using His shed blood to counter Satan's accusations and secure forgiveness and intercession, similar to the biblical account of Job.

THE BRANSON MISSOURI OUTPOURING: Brandon shares a prophetic vision concerning a major upcoming spiritual revival centered in Branson, Missouri, specifically involving the ministry of Billy Brim and her granddaughter Hannah. He describes seeing them in a massive theater and convention center, which he was instructed to pray for their financial breakthrough to acquire. Brandon predicts this location will become a continuous hotspot for unprecedented creative miracles, including the instantaneous regrowth of limbs, eyes, ears, and fingers.
rawData: [January 15, 2024]-[Faith calls those things that be not as though they were]-[https://youtu.be/6CH2c41mmn0]-[Good morning family. I just wanted to come on and tell you all some things the Lord's put on my heart in prayer. First of all, I've been reading the comment section. There are so many of you that are still talking about addictions, and you are saying, "Please pray for me for cigarettes or alcohol," or whatever; there's a lot of things being said. So I want to help you again. Listen, Romans says faith calleth those things that be not as though they were. Call those things that be not as though they were. Do you understand that? Okay. So every time you go up to smoke your cigarette, call yourself delivered from nicotine because you're using Romans: "faith calleth those things that be not as though they were," and faith without works is dead. Okay, so you've got to put your faith into motion. You've got to put your faith into motion working this. You can't just sit there and rely on going, "Oh God, I'm asking you just to deliver me." We're calling those things that be not as though they were, but faith without works is dead. You're activating your faith like a muscle by quoting the scripture at your problem, speaking to your mountain, speaking to your circumstances, calling those things that be not as though they were. "I am delivered from alcohol. I am delivered from cigarettes." So every time you have a temptation, every time you have these cravings, say, "Thank you Father. I thank you Father that I'm delivered." I use Romans, calling those things that be not as though they were. Right now I call myself delivered from nicotine, I am delivered from pornography, I am delivered from whatever. It doesn't matter; nothing's too big, nothing's too hard for our God. You can call those things that be not as though they were in every area of your life. I call myself blessed, I call myself healed, I am delivered. Now, faith without works is dead. And if you have a sickness, or a disease, or some kind of whatever, start activating it; start moving your body around. There was a lady that was bound by diabetes and she was struggling with diabetes, and every morning she woke up and she started saying out of her mouth, "Faith calleth those things that be not as though they are," and, "I say I'm delivered from diabetes in Jesus' name." She didn't stop taking her medicine, she didn't stop giving herself her insulin, but she kept speaking to it. She kept speaking to the circumstances. This is a true story. So she'd give herself the diabetic shot in her stomach and she would do her pills or whatever she would have to do, and she would keep calling those things that be not as though they were. And every day she quoted that out of her mouth. One day she started feeling so sick she had to call the hospital and the ambulance, and they came and got her because she thought she was dying; something was wrong. She went in there and she did all the blood work, and they checked her blood and everything was... she thought, "Man, there's something really seriously wrong." They said, "Why are you taking diabetes medicine?" She goes, "Because I'm diabetic." They said, "Well, you aren't. You're not diabetic anymore." She was completely healed by the power of God and delivered, and all she used was the word where faith calleth those things that be not as though they were, and she kept speaking that over her life. I call myself delivered by the power of Jesus. I speak to my circumstances of being bound by whatever. It could be overcoming cancer; I call myself delivered from cancer. I call myself delivered from asthma. I call myself delivered from whatever, high blood pressure. I call those things that be not as though they were. The word will work if you work it. Okay, I know it beyond a shadow of a doubt. When you are using your faith and you're calling those things like what I'm talking about, faith without works is dead, and faith worketh by love. So you've got to get out of strife if you want your faith working. If you want the mountain-moving faith to be moving in your life, you've got to walk in love; you've got to get strife out of your home because faith works by love. If your faith's not working, you've got to make sure your love walk is right. It's important because that's one of the things that's going to help put the power behind what you're believing for. Getting love is a priority. I always want to be one that is quick to repent, always be one if I mess up and I'm snipping at my wife, and I say, "You know what? I shouldn't have done that. I am sorry, honey." I want to be always quick because when you're in discord and you're not in unity in your home, it blocks the blessings. You want to be underneath the blessing flow; you've got to get sin out of your life. The Lord told me, "Brandon, you need to go and tell those people that I am coming back for a purified people. You need to tell them to start believing." I hear all these people say, "Oh, there's grace, it's all underneath the blood." Yes, His grace is sufficient for me, but the Bible says to work out our salvation with fear and trembling. If you are not trying to live a repentant lifestyle, if you're not living a holiness lifestyle... yeah, well our holiness is as filthy rags, but you don't practice sin. If there's no difference between you and the world, and you're standing in a lineup like it would be in a jail cell, could we pick out the Christian in the lineup? Are you able to be different from the world, or are you smelling like the world? That's what I'm trying to tell you all: you've got to have a difference. There has to be a divine line so that if people are walking by you, they see Jesus in you; they don't go, "Well, he just looks like an average person in the world." We need to be a people that are standing out for Jesus. We were driving, and just like I do in the mornings when I'm praying, I had it up loud. I was listening to one of my mentors, my prayer mentors, Gina, and I was praying with her because she does a Saturday morning prayer conference thing every Saturday. I was listening to that and I had it up really loud in my car and I was praying in the spirit really loud with her, and all of a sudden, the guy beside us started manifesting with devils. He started growling and acting just way absurd, just flipping out in his car. The demonic spirit was doing that through the manifestation, I believe, of the glory of God in our car because devils don't start manifesting until they feel the presence of God like that. They start feeling the glory, they're going to start manifesting. The glory of God obviously was manifesting in our car when I was praying in the spirit, and my son was with me, and he looked over, and we were both looking at that guy like, "What is going on with him?" But he was going, and all of a sudden he just stopped and he started looking at us and just looking out the window, and I thought, "What in the world?" because I wasn't putting two and two together that this guy's having a demonic attack because of the glory. I was driving and the Lord said, "Brandon, do you not understand what's going on?" He said, "The glory of God is starting to be present, son," and he said that stuff's going to start happening all the time. In the book of Acts, they would all bring out the sick in the streets so that even the shadows of Peter might come and touch them. That's how much the radiated presence of God was coming out of him. That kind of presence can come out of you. If you get yourself full of the word of God, get yourself so full of the Holy Ghost that when you go into Walmart, or when you go into these places, wherever you're at... in Australia, I don't know where you all shop, but or in Europe or whatever, you can walk down the street and the power of God be so strong coming out of you that people are delivered. That's the kind of stuff I'm talking about for the end times; that's the kind of stuff that's going to be happening soon. It could be happening now, but I'm telling you, I'm believing for that: the raising of the dead, the casting out of devils, the healing the sick, cleansing lepers, whatever. The power of God has come to set the captives free, and he whom the Son has set free is free indeed. If he set people free back then in the Bible, how much more will he do with a greater covenant? Jesus was operating in the Abrahamic covenant with all power and authority given to him, but he created the New Covenant for us on the cross. He set us free by the power of the blood of the Lamb, and you don't have to be bound by anything. You don't have to be bound by addictions, you don't have to be bound by sickness, you don't have to be bound by poverty and lack, but the Bible says that we have whatsoever things we say. I'm telling you, your tongue is powerful, and you start speaking, calling those things to be not as though they were over your finances. You sow seed. I speak to my tithe all the time and my offerings, and I say, "God, I thank you that you said in Malachi that you rebuke the devourer for my sake, and I thank you, God, I sow these seeds by faith and I thank you Lord that you're turning my situation around." You know what? A lot of people think, "Well, it's just going to happen." No, faith without works is dead. I want to tell you it like this: the key to the miraculous is obedience. Do what He tells you to do. If He tells you to do something in a Walmart store, or wherever, you do it, and God's going to start using you in a greater capacity than whatever you could hope or imagine. It's going to be amazing, but you've got to start out walking and doing it in faith. You can't just sit there. Be obedient and be quick to obey. It's time to believe the impossible; it's time for you to stretch out and believe for the miraculous. We're in the last of the last days and there's going to be a great shifting. Now, the Lord told me again to talk to you about the end-time heart. A lot of people in the comment section say, "Is there a revival before Jesus comes back? Is there a revival after he comes back?" Yes, both. God is a God of souls; He wants everybody to be saved. I just want to be on the first round, y'all. I'm just telling you, you don't want to be left here. Now, all these people that say they're going through tribulation, that's between you and God. I'm not believing that, but I'm still believing for a Rapture of the church. You quote all these scriptures at me in the comment section and tell me how I'm so wrong, but I'm standing on my faith that I've not been appointed unto wrath and I'm going to go with Jesus Christ. When he calls me up, we're going for the Marriage Supper of the Lamb. I've told you everything I've seen, I told you about the chip and everything that the Lord has showed me. If you don't want to believe that, that's fine, but I'm telling you it's going to be hell on Earth, and we are not going to be here for it. He is not a wife beater; God is not a wife beater and we're His bride, we're His children. The judgment's coming and it's going to be bad, and people are going through a lot that don't get born again. It's because they turned away from God. He said the gospel will be preached throughout all the world and then the end will come. So that tells me right there that He's giving you the opportunity to hear the gospel or He's a liar, and He's not a liar. You're having an opportunity right now as we speak. Jesus loves you and He has a plan for your life. He wants to heal your body, He wants to save your soul, but you have got to make the decision. Make Jesus Christ your pilot. Stop running your life; it's messed up. You've got all these problems, you're broke, busted, and disgusted. Let Jesus have the steering wheel, folks, and let him take the wheel. Like Carrie Underwood said, "Jesus, take the wheel." Come on, let Jesus take the wheel in your life. You have the opportunity right now to turn your life around. Call on him right now, repent of your sins. Jesus wants the best for you. And if you're here and the Rapture's happened and you're left, God have mercy on you. You can still call out to him. "God, forgive me of my sins, write my name in the Lamb's Book of Life, wash me in your blood, I need you." You can do that right now where you're seated. He'll come to you and He'll abide inside of you. "If ye abide in me and my words abide in you, ye shall ask what ye will and it shall be done." He'll save your soul, but you've got to believe it. You have to believe that he that cometh to God must believe that he is, and that he is a rewarder of those that diligently seek him. Don't keep practicing sin. Let me tell you this: I saw one time I was dealing with some sin issues and I saw in the heavenlies a great courtroom. The Bible says that Satan is the accuser of the brethren and he was up there, and it was a great courtroom. I could see a great light on a throne and I could hear Jesus, and he was standing over here as the attorney, and Satan was accusing. "See? He messed up again. Now he's opened the door, I can come in and rob him of anything I want." An angel came down and he talked to me in the spirit realm and he said, "See? He's accusing you right now. Stop opening the door for this attack. Stop it. Make my job easier." He was begging me, like, "Stop it." And I heard the Lord say... I could see Jesus standing there and I heard him say, "Brandon, take communion quickly." So I went out and I got my cracker and my juice and I started taking it. I said, "Father, I take your body, I thank you Lord, forgive me of my sins, I've opened the door, I've done these things and I repent." I started pleading the blood and Jesus said, "See? He pleads the blood. My blood speaks for him." I could see the blood and it was standing for me. Jesus is your attorney. Jesus is the one that was rebuking the devil for your sake, and he's standing in the courtroom of Heaven standing in the gap for you, calling out for the blood. "Look at my blood, look at my stripes, look what I've done." He is your attorney in the courtroom and he's saying, "My blood is sufficient for your sins, my blood is sufficient for everything that you have need of." You don't have to be bound by the work of the devil; you can be free by the blood of the Lamb. You just have to receive it by faith. He stood in the gap for me, making intercession for me, saying, "God, he has messed up," and he was making intercession for me. "Forgive him for he knows not what he does." And he was making intercession for you. If you're one of His and you're a child of the King, he's making intercession for you. He's standing in the gap because He is a good God, He's a faithful God. I'm telling you that Satan is up there looking just like he did with Job. "Look at all those things that they're doing down on the earth. Oh, he's opened the door through fear. Let me go down there. The reason You've protected him so much, Lord... look, see God, You've protected him so much, that's why he worships You so much. But if You take that covering off and let me do some things, he'll curse You to Your face." Job never did it. Remember that Satan's still doing his old nasty tricks: he tempts you to sin then he's up there accusing you of doing what he tempted you to do. He's a piece of crap. I'm just telling you, I've seen it all in the spirit realm. I hope I didn't butcher this story for what I saw in the spirit realm, but I'm telling you Jesus's blood is sufficient. He paid the price for sin for you, and you don't have to earn your salvation, but we work it out by fear and trembling. There's no way to earn it; it's by grace, but you need to press in by getting in the word, going to church, reading your Bible, and doing what the Bible tells us to do. Now I'm going to talk about the glory, okay? Because the Lord told me to tell you all about the outpourings again. There is a ministry in Branson, Missouri—I've seen this ministry and what they're going to do. It's Billy Brim. A lot of people don't like it that she's a woman minister, but I'm telling you one of the first outpourings that happens will be in Branson, Missouri. I asked the Lord one time, I said, "Lord, why is Branson, Missouri... why did you show me that?" He said, "Because she prays and is always talking about the glorious church, talking about the end-time outpouring," and he said, "Son, I'm going... that's going to be a hotspot because of her ministry and her granddaughter Hannah." I saw Hannah, I saw her granddaughter in a massive auditorium. It was a big theater in Branson, and the Lord told me they're believing me for this massive auditorium convention center thing. I saw the price, and he told me to pray and call those things that be not as though they were, believing God for financial breakthrough for them to be able to purchase this theater. I saw creative miracle power coming out of there, massive amounts of healings 24/7 all the time, a revival happening in Branson never stopping, always people coming in getting healed and going out. One of the hotspots will be Branson, Missouri. I've seen the legs growing out, I've seen people with no eyes having new eyes, I've seen ears coming back, I've seen fingers coming back full of great creative miracles. This next revival will be one of the great creative miracle revivals we've ever known. This will be the miraculous beyond anything you can comprehend. It's going to be something that is going to be like a movie; you're going to go, "Wow, this is too good to be true," you know? But that's how amazing it's going to be. So I just want to encourage you today to believe the impossible and believe for creative miracles and keep a smile on your face and a song in your heart because Jesus loves you so much. Thank you for watching this and I hope this blessed you today. Have a great day. Bye-bye.]
